title: Map View - Default Satellite View
excerpt: Hello, I’d like to submit a feature request. There should be an option to change the map view to “Satellite”. Right now, you can only keep the default view as “Map View.” I can get to Satellite View by going “Full Screen…

posts.author: patrickRE (Patrick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I’d like to submit a feature request. There should be an option to change the map view to “Satellite”. Right now, you can only keep the default view as “Map View.” I can get to Satellite View by going “Full Screen”, but that is an additional cumbersome step that interrupts my natural workflow.

Thank you.
